title: AGENTS.md manual synthnote pipeline proof test cross-link
problem: Tickets 105–106 completed unified e2e and idempotency tests through reconcile-scores. AGENTS.md should cross-link the proof test modules so builder agents discover automated manual synthnote validation without reading tests/ only.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md operator loop section links to manual synthnote pipeline e2e and idempotency unit tests.
No production code or golden test changes.
non_goals: No live Ollama, export, schema migration, or README rewrite.
